project_overview.name: Rare Books Bot
project_overview.mission: Conversational bibliographic discovery system for rare books where MARC XML is the source of truth
project_overview.primary_goal: Enable users to discover rare books through a conversational chatbot interface backed by deterministic, evidence-based queries over MARC XML records
project_overview.core_philosophy: Evidence before interpretation. Every query response includes QueryPlan, CandidateSet, Evidence, and normalized mappings with confidence scores
project_overview.status: All 7 milestones implemented. Backend pipeline (M1-M4) complete. Chatbot API (M6) complete. Metadata Workbench (M7) complete.

frameworks.llm: OpenAI GPT-4o via Responses API (structured output)

scripts/marc/parse.py.purpose: M1: MARC XML parser for canonical record extraction using pymarc
key_functions: parse_marc_xml_file(marc_xml_path: Path, output_path: Path, report_path: Path) -> ExtractionReport
_make_source_ref(tag: str, occurrence: int, subfield: str) -> str

scripts/marc/models.py.purpose: M1 Pydantic data models for canonical MARC records
key_classes: SourcedValue(BaseModel) - value with MARC source provenance
AgentData(BaseModel) - author/contributor with agent_type, role_source, authority_uri
SubjectData(BaseModel) - subject heading with parts, scheme, authority_uri
CanonicalRecord(BaseModel) - full canonical record with title, imprints, languages, subjects, agents, notes, acquisition

scripts/marc/m2_models.py.purpose: M2 normalization Pydantic models for enriched fields

scripts/marc/normalize.py.purpose: M2 normalization functions: deterministic, rule-based normalization for dates, places, publishers, agents
key_functions: normalize_place(raw: Optional[str], evidence_path: str, alias_map: Optional[Dict]) -> PlaceNormalization
normalize_publisher(raw: Optional[str], evidence_path: str, alias_map: Optional[Dict]) -> PublisherNormalization
enrich_m2(m1_record: dict, place_alias_map, publisher_alias_map, agent_alias_map) -> dict

scripts/marc/m2_normalize.py.purpose: M2 normalization CLI: reads M1 JSONL and outputs M1+M2 enriched JSONL
key_functions: process_m1_to_m2(input_path, output_path, place_alias_path, publisher_alias_path, agent_alias_path) -> dict

scripts/marc/m3_contract.py.purpose: M3 database schema contract - single source of truth for table/column names
key_classes: M3Tables - table name constants (records, titles, imprints, subjects, agents, languages, notes, physical_descriptions, authority_enrichment, titles_fts, subjects_fts)
M3Columns.Records - id, mms_id, source_file, created_at, jsonl_line_number
M3Columns.Titles - id, record_id, title_type, value, source
M3Columns.Imprints - 22 columns: raw + normalized date/place/publisher + country
M3Columns.Subjects - 9 columns including authority_uri, scheme, heading_lang
M3Columns.Agents - 14 columns: raw + normalized agent/role + provenance
M3Aliases - common table aliases for SQL

scripts/marc/m3_index.py.purpose: M3: Build SQLite bibliographic index from M1+M2 JSONL records with optional Wikidata enrichment
key_functions: enrich_authority_uris(conn, uris, enrichment_service, rate_limit_delay) -> Dict[str, int]

scripts/marc/m3_query.py.purpose: Low-level M3 query functions for testing and debugging (direct SQL without QueryPlan)
key_classes: CandidateSet - set of candidate records with evidence

scripts/marc/rebuild_pipeline.py.purpose: End-to-end pipeline script: M1 parse -> M2 normalize -> M3 index
key_functions: run_m2_normalize(m1_input, m2_output, place_alias, publisher_alias, agent_alias) -> bool

scripts/marc/build_place_freq.py.purpose: Build place frequency table from MARC XML for alias mapping preparation

scripts/schemas/query_plan.py.purpose: QueryPlan Pydantic model for M4 - defines NL query -> structured plan schema
key_classes: FilterField(str, Enum) - publisher, imprint_place, country, year, language, title, subject, agent, agent_norm, agent_role, agent_type
FilterOp(str, Enum) - EQUALS, CONTAINS, RANGE, IN
Filter(BaseModel) - field, op, value/start/end, negate, confidence, notes
QueryPlan(BaseModel) - version, query_text, filters, soft_filters, limit, debug

scripts/schemas/candidate_set.py.purpose: CandidateSet Pydantic model for M4 - query execution results with evidence
key_classes: Evidence(BaseModel) - field, value, operator, matched_against, source, confidence, extraction_error
Candidate(BaseModel) - record_id, match_rationale, evidence[], title, author, date_start/end, place, publisher, subjects, description
CandidateSet(BaseModel) - query_text, plan_hash, sql, sql_parameters, candidates[], total_count

scripts/query/compile.py.purpose: Query compiler entry point - delegates to LLM compiler

scripts/query/llm_compiler.py.purpose: LLM-based query compiler using OpenAI Responses API with Pydantic schema enforcement and JSONL caching
key_classes: QueryPlanLLM(BaseModel) - LLM-compatible model without debug field
key_functions: compile_query_llm(query_text: str, limit: Optional[int], api_key: Optional[str], model: str) -> QueryPlan

scripts/query/execute.py.purpose: Query executor: QueryPlan -> SQL -> CandidateSet with evidence extraction

scripts/query/db_adapter.py.purpose: Database adapter: maps M4 filters to M3 schema, generates SQL, handles JOINs and evidence extraction
key_functions: normalize_filter_value(field: FilterField, raw_value: str, op: FilterOp) -> str

scripts/query/service.py.purpose: Unified QueryService - single entry point for all query execution across all interfaces
key_classes: QueryService - execute(user_message, session_id, options) -> QueryResult, execute_plan(plan, options) -> QueryResult

scripts/query/models.py.purpose: Extended query result schemas for QueryService
key_classes: FacetCounts(BaseModel) - by_place, by_year, by_language, by_publisher, by_century
QueryResult(BaseModel) - query_plan, sql, params, candidate_set, facets, warnings, execution_time_ms
QueryCompilationError - with class methods from_missing_api_key(), from_api_error(), from_invalid_response()

scripts/query/subject_hints.py.purpose: Extract top subject headings from database for LLM query retry hints

scripts/chat/models.py.purpose: Core chat data structures: sessions, messages, two-phase conversation support
key_classes: ExplorationIntent(str, Enum) - METADATA_QUESTION, AGGREGATION, ENRICHMENT_REQUEST, RECOMMENDATION, COMPARISON, REFINEMENT, NEW_QUERY
Message(BaseModel) - role, content, query_plan, candidate_set, timestamp
ChatSession(BaseModel) - session_id, user_id, messages, context, metadata
ChatResponse(BaseModel) - message, candidate_set, suggested_followups, clarification_needed, session_id, phase, confidence, metadata

scripts/chat/session_store.py.purpose: SQLite-backed persistent storage for multi-turn conversations with phase tracking
key_classes: SessionStore - create_session, add_message, get_session, expire_old_sessions, update_phase, set_active_subgroup

scripts/chat/formatter.py.purpose: Transform CandidateSet results into natural language chat responses
key_functions: format_for_chat(candidate_set: CandidateSet, max_candidates: int, show_evidence: bool) -> str

scripts/chat/clarification.py.purpose: Ambiguity detection and clarification prompt generation

scripts/chat/intent_agent.py.purpose: Phase 1 intent interpretation: interprets user queries with confidence scoring using OpenAI Responses API
key_classes: InterpretedQueryLLM(BaseModel) - LLM output for intent interpretation

scripts/chat/exploration_agent.py.purpose: Phase 2 exploration agent: interprets corpus exploration requests using OpenAI Responses API

scripts/chat/aggregation.py.purpose: Deterministic SQL aggregation engine for corpus exploration (no LLM)

scripts/normalization/normalize_agent.py.purpose: Agent and role normalization: deterministic base normalization for names
key_functions: normalize_agent_with_alias_map(agent_raw: str, alias_map: Optional[Dict]) -> Tuple[str, float, str]
normalize_role_base(role_raw: Optional[str], role_source: Optional[str]) -> Tuple[str, float, str]

scripts/normalization/extract_unmapped_p.purpose: Extract unmapped places from database for alias mapping

scripts/metadata/audit.py.purpose: Normalization coverage audit: queries SQLite and produces structured confidence/method reports
key_classes: LowConfidenceItem - raw_value, norm_value, confidence, method, frequency
FieldCoverage - total_records, non_null_count, null_count, confidence_distribution, method_distribution, flagged_items

scripts/metadata/clustering.py.purpose: Gap clustering for low-confidence metadata values using deterministic heuristics
key_classes: Cluster - cluster_id, field, cluster_type, values, proposed_canonical, evidence, priority_score

scripts/metadata/agent_harness.py.purpose: Shared agent harness with GroundingLayer (deterministic DB queries) and ReasoningLayer (LLM-assisted proposals)
key_classes: GapRecord - mms_id, field, raw_value, current_norm, confidence, method
ProposedMapping - raw_value, canonical_value, confidence, reasoning, evidence_sources

scripts/metadata/agents/place_agent.py.purpose: Specialist agent for place normalization: Latin toponyms, Hebrew names, country codes
key_classes: PlaceAnalysis - total_places, high/medium/low confidence counts, clusters, top_gaps

scripts/metadata/agents/date_agent.py.purpose: Specialist agent for date normalization: Hebrew calendars, Latin conventions, Roman numerals
key_classes: ProposedDate - raw_value, date_start, date_end, method, confidence, reasoning

scripts/metadata/agents/publisher_agent..purpose: Specialist agent for publisher normalization: Latin formulae, printer dynasties, missing markers
key_classes: PublisherAgent - analyze(), get_gaps(), detect_missing_publisher(), get_clusters(), propose_mappings()

scripts/metadata/agents/name_agent.py.purpose: Specialist agent for name authority normalization: VIAF/NLI authority cross-reference, fuzzy matching
key_classes: AgentRecord - mms_id, agent_raw, agent_norm, confidence, authority_uri
NameAgent - analyze(), get_low_confidence_agents(), match_against_authorities(), get_clusters(), propose_mappings()

scripts/metadata/feedback_loop.py.purpose: HITL feedback loop: approve correction -> update alias map -> re-normalize DB -> log change
key_classes: CorrectionResult - field, raw_value, canonical_value, records_updated, success
key_functions: apply_correction(field, raw_value, canonical_value, db_path, alias_map_dir, review_log_path) -> CorrectionResult

scripts/metadata/publisher_authority.py.purpose: Publisher authority record store: CRUD for canonical publisher identities and name variants
key_classes: PublisherAuthority - canonical_name, type, dates_active, location, viaf/wikidata/cerl IDs

scripts/metadata/populate_publisher_auth.purpose: Populate publisher authority database from research JSON file

scripts/metadata/review_log.py.purpose: Queryable review log for tracking approved/rejected correction decisions
key_classes: ReviewEntry - timestamp, field, raw_value, canonical_value, evidence, source, action

scripts/metadata/interaction_logger.py.purpose: JSONL logger for workbench user interactions (analytics/debugging)
key_classes: InteractionLogger - log(action, field, params, result_summary, duration_ms, error)

scripts/enrichment/enrichment_service.py.purpose: Main enrichment interface: cache-first lookups, multi-source fallback (NLI -> Wikidata -> VIAF)

scripts/enrichment/models.py.purpose: Pydantic models for enrichment: requests, results, entity types, sources
key_classes: EntityType(str, Enum) - AGENT, PLACE, PUBLISHER, SUBJECT, WORK
EnrichmentSource(str, Enum) - NLI, WIKIDATA, VIAF, LOC, ISNI, CACHE
EnrichmentResult(BaseModel) - entity_type, entity_value, identifiers, person_info, place_info

scripts/enrichment/wikidata_client.py.purpose: Wikidata SPARQL client for agent/place enrichment

scripts/enrichment/nli_client.py.purpose: NLI authority client: extract external identifiers from NLI records via Wikidata P8189 property

scripts/enrichment/run_batch_enrichment..purpose: Batch enrichment script for agents with NLI authority URIs

scripts/utils/logger.py.purpose: Centralized logging with dual output (console + file), JSON format support
key_classes: LoggerManager - get_logger(name, task_paths, run_id, level, use_json)

scripts/utils/llm_logger.py.purpose: LLM call logging with cost tracking, prompt capture, and token usage
key_functions: log_llm_call(call_type, model, system_prompt, user_prompt, response, session_id)

scripts/utils/config_loader.py.purpose: YAML configuration file loader with dot-notation access

scripts/api_clients/openai/completer.py.purpose: OpenAI API client wrapper (from template, partially adapted)

app/cli.py.purpose: Typer CLI with commands: parse_marc, query, index, chat_init, chat_history, chat_cleanup
key_commands: query(query_text, db, out, session_id) - M4 query execution

app/qa.py.purpose: CLI regression runner for QA gold set testing
key_commands: regress(gold, db, verbose, log_file) - run gold set regression tests

key_endpoints: POST /chat - natural language query with two-phase conversation

app/api/metadata.py.purpose: FastAPI router for metadata quality endpoints (12 endpoints)
key_endpoints: GET /metadata/coverage - overall coverage stats per field

app/api/models.py.purpose: FastAPI request/response models for /chat and /health endpoints

app/ui_qa/main.py.purpose: Streamlit QA tool entry point (5 pages for query testing and labeling)

app/ui_qa/db.py.purpose: QA database management (qa.db with tables for queries, labels, gold sets)

app/ui_chat/main.py.purpose: Streamlit chat UI that connects to FastAPI backend

stages.name: Canonical Extraction
stages.description: Parses MARC XML using pymarc, extracts structured data with subfield-level provenance (tag, occurrence, subfield). Deterministic - same input produces same output.

stages.name: Normalization
stages.description: Enriches M1 records with normalized dates, places, publishers, and agents. All normalization is rule-based, reversible, and confidence-scored. Uses optional alias maps for place/publisher/agent names.

stages.name: SQLite Indexing
stages.description: Builds queryable SQLite index with 9 tables (records, titles, imprints, subjects, agents, languages, notes, physical_descriptions, authority_enrichment) plus 2 FTS5 virtual tables. Raw and normalized values stored side-by-side.

tables.imprints: 22 columns: raw date/place/publisher + M2 normalized date/place/publisher + country
tables.subjects: Subject headings with parts, scheme, authority_uri
tables.agents: 14 columns: raw + M2 normalized agent/role + provenance JSON

stages.name: Query Pipeline
stages.description: NL query -> LLM compile (GPT-4o) -> QueryPlan (Pydantic validated) -> SQL generation -> execution -> CandidateSet with per-record Evidence. Subject retry with hints if zero results.

stages.name: Enrichment
stages.output: Enrichment data cached in authority_enrichment table + cache.db
stages.description: Multi-source enrichment: NLI authority URI -> Wikidata P8189 lookup -> entity data (person/place info, external IDs). Cache-first with TTL.

stages.name: Chatbot API
stages.output: ChatResponse with natural language message, candidate_set, followups
stages.description: Two-phase conversational API. Phase 1: Query definition with intent interpretation and confidence scoring. Phase 2: Corpus exploration with aggregation, comparison, refinement. Supports sessions, clarification, streaming.

stages.name: Metadata Workbench
stages.output: Corrected alias maps, updated database records
stages.description: Agent-driven HITL system with 4 specialist agents (Place, Date, Publisher, Name). Coverage audit -> gap detection -> agent-assisted proposals -> human review -> feedback loop -> database update.

query_system.flow: NL Query -> compile_query_llm() -> QueryPlan (validated by Pydantic + OpenAI strict schema) -> build_where_clause() -> SQL with JOINs -> execute -> CandidateSet with Evidence
query_system.retry_mechanism: If subject filter returns zero results, retries with top subject hints from database
query_system.facets: Optional aggregation: by_place, by_year, by_language, by_publisher, by_century

phase_1_query_definition.description: User defines their search criteria. Intent agent interprets query with confidence scoring.

phase_2_corpus_exploration.description: User explores a defined subgroup with aggregation, comparison, enrichment, refinement.

clarification_flow.blocking_vs_non_blocking: Empty filters block execution; other triggers are non-blocking warnings

metadata_workbench.purpose: Agent-driven HITL system for improving bibliographic metadata quality
metadata_workbench.architecture: React Frontend -> FastAPI Backend -> Grounding Layer + Specialist Agents + Action Layer

specialist_agents.name: PlaceAgent
specialist_agents.domain: Latin toponyms, Hebrew names, country codes, historical place name changes

specialist_agents.name: DateAgent
specialist_agents.domain: Hebrew calendar, Latin conventions, Roman numerals, partial centuries

specialist_agents.name: PublisherAgent
specialist_agents.domain: Latin formulae (ex officina, typis, apud), printer dynasties, s.n. detection

specialist_agents.name: NameAgent
specialist_agents.domain: VIAF/NLI authority cross-reference, name form variants, fuzzy matching

feedback_loop.flow: Approve correction -> Write to alias map JSON -> Re-normalize affected DB records -> Log to review log -> Report coverage improvement

coverage_audit.reports: Confidence bands, method distributions, flagged low-confidence items by frequency

gap_clustering.features: Script detection (Hebrew, Arabic, Latin, CJK), pattern classification, priority scoring

fields.title: Optional[SourcedValue]
fields.subjects: List[SubjectData] (value, parts, source_tag, scheme, heading_lang, authority_uri)
fields.agents: List[AgentData] (name, entry_role, function, dates, agent_type, agent_index, role_source, authority_uri)

query_plan.fields: version, query_text, filters: List[Filter], soft_filters, limit, debug

candidate_set.fields: query_text, plan_hash, sql, sql_parameters, generated_at, candidates: List[Candidate], total_count

chat_response.fields: message, candidate_set, suggested_followups, clarification_needed, session_id, phase, confidence, metadata

data_model.provenance_pattern: Every value has a SourcedValue wrapper containing (value: Any, source: List[str]) where source is MARC field$subfield notation like '260$a', '650[0]$a', '008/35-37'

principles: All normalization is deterministic (no LLM calls in core pipeline)
Raw values always preserved alongside normalized
Every normalization is reversible: raw + norm + method + confidence stored
Confidence scores range 0.0-1.0 with explicit meaning
Method tags identify which rule produced the normalization

confidence_levels.0.90: Circa, range, bracketed Gregorian, embedded range

place_normalization.process: casefold -> strip punctuation -> remove brackets -> NFKC normalize -> alias map lookup

agent_normalization.process: casefold -> strip brackets -> NFKC normalize -> strip trailing punctuation -> collapse whitespace -> optional alias map

role_normalization.process: Map MARC relator codes/terms to controlled vocabulary

failing_tests_root_causes.root_cause: Test fixture missing record_id column; schema mismatch with implementation
detect_script() tie-breaking prefers Hebrew even when Latin dominates
FTS5 subjects table incorrectly added to outer JOIN set

frontend.purpose: Metadata Co-pilot Workbench for librarian HITL quality improvement

pages.name: Dashboard
pages.description: Coverage overview with pie charts per field (date, place, publisher, agent_name), confidence band visualization

pages.name: Workbench
pages.description: Issue inspection and correction submission with editable cells, batch toolbar, cluster cards

pages.name: AgentChat
pages.description: Conversational interface for specialist metadata agents

frontend.api_client: frontend/src/api/metadata.ts - fetchCoverage, fetchIssues, fetchClusters, submitCorrection, sendAgentChat, fetchCorrectionHistory
frontend.types: frontend/src/types/metadata.ts - TypeScript interfaces mirroring Python Pydantic models

chat.description: Send natural language query, get structured response with evidence
Get session details and message history
Streaming responses with progress, batches, and complete messages

metadata.description: Overall normalization coverage stats per field (date, place, publisher, agent_name, agent_role)
Low-confidence records (paginated). Params: field, max_confidence, limit, offset
Raw values without canonical mappings, sorted by frequency
Distribution of normalization methods per field
Gap clusters for batch review. Optional field filter
Generate batch Primo catalog URLs for MMS IDs
Single Primo catalog URL for a record
Agent conversation: interact with specialist metadata agents
Publisher authority records with variant counts and imprint counts. Optional type filter

findings.P0_critical: None identified. Core pipeline is sound.
P1_architectural: FINDING-01: 11 metadata API tests failing (schema mismatch in test fixtures)
FINDING-02: Evidence extraction failures silently swallowed (violates Answer Contract)
FINDING-03: Date normalization at 68.2% high-confidence (881 imprints below threshold)
P2_maintainability: FINDING-05: detect_script() logic bug - Hebrew preferred over dominant Latin
FINDING-06: FTS5 subject query adds unnecessary JOIN
FINDING-07: app/api/metadata.py (1,484 lines) and app/api/main.py (1,288 lines) are oversized
FINDING-08: Pydantic v1-style Config classes need migration to ConfigDict
FINDING-09: FastAPI on_event deprecation - migrate to lifespan handlers

contract_enforcement.QueryPlan_schema: Schema-enforced (Pydantic + OpenAI Responses API) - Low risk
contract_enforcement.Evidence_completeness: None - High risk (extraction failures silently swallowed)
